case_title: STEPHEN SEEWER VS. WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION -AMENDED TO MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT , POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEEWER, STEPHEN
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-16-2010 CONTINUED TO AUG-27-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR DEFENDANT(S) TO FILE AND SERVE ORDERS RE DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT AND DEMURRER (HEARD MAY-24-2010)
REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOS. TO DEMURRER TO PLTF'S COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC BIGGS, PATRICK

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC, AND, PATRICK BRIGGS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 1ST AND 2ND CAUSES OF ACTION AS TO BRIGGS. A SUPERVISOR CANNOT BE INDIVIDUALLY LIABLE ON THOSE CLAIMS AS A MATTER OF LAW. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY PLEADS THAT HE WAS CONSTRUCTIVELY TERMINATED BECAUSE OF HIS SEXUAL ORIENTATION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Continued To Aug-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC, and, PATRICK BRIGGS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Mark L. Webb, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 434-0500 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Joseph R. Becerra, Esq. of Jones, Bell, Abbott, Fleming & Fitzgerald LLP (213) 485-1555 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to 1st and 2nd causes of action as to Briggs. A supervisor cannot be individually liable on those claims as a matter of law. Demurrer overruled as to Wells Fargo Investments, 10 days leave to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently pleads that he was constructively terminated because of his sexual orientation. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS WELLS FARGO INVESTMENTS, LLC, and, PATRICK BRIGGS MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT. Appearances: Mark L. Webb, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 434-0500 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Joseph R. Becerra, Esq. of Jones, Bell, Abbott, Fleming & Fitzgerald LLP (213) 485-1555 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied, 10 days leave to answer.(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
